tasks.label: check-foc-source-paths-2
tasks.command: Set-Location "examples/GD32F303_FOCExplore/software"; Write-Output ("foc_app_path=" + (Resolve-Path "../../../foc/src/L1_Orchestration/foc_app.c" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)); Write-Output ("foc_app_exists=" + (Test-Path "../../../foc/src/L1_Orchestration/foc_app.c")); Write-Output ("cm_path=" + (Resolve-Path "../../../foc/src/L2_Service/command_manager.c" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)); Write-Output ("cm_exists=" + (Test-Path "../../../foc/src/L2_Service/command_manager.c"))

tasks.label: phase-d-changed-files
tasks.command: Set-Location .; git diff --name-only -- docs/architecture.md docs/development.md examples/GD32F303_FOCExplore/software/.eide/eide.yml examples/GD32F303_FOCExplore/software/build/GD32F30X_CL/builder.params examples/GD32F303_FOCExplore/software/Application/Include/main.h foc/port/foc_platform_api_empty.c foc/include foc/src

tasks.label: phase-d-changed-files-to-file
tasks.command: Set-Location .; git diff --name-only -- docs/architecture.md docs/development.md examples/GD32F303_FOCExplore/software/.eide/eide.yml examples/GD32F303_FOCExplore/software/build/GD32F30X_CL/builder.params examples/GD32F303_FOCExplore/software/Application/Include/main.h foc/port/foc_platform_api_empty.c foc/include foc/src | Set-Content phase_d_changed_files.txt

tasks.label: phase-d-old-dir-check
tasks.command: ('foc/include/config=' + (Test-Path 'foc/include/config')) | Out-Host; ('foc/include/core=' + (Test-Path 'foc/include/core')) | Out-Host; ('foc/include/service=' + (Test-Path 'foc/include/service')) | Out-Host; ('foc/include/algorithm=' + (Test-Path 'foc/include/algorithm')) | Out-Host; ('foc/include/math=' + (Test-Path 'foc/include/math')) | Out-Host; ('foc/include/interface=' + (Test-Path 'foc/include/interface')) | Out-Host; ('foc/src/core=' + (Test-Path 'foc/src/core')) | Out-Host; ('foc/src/service=' + (Test-Path 'foc/src/service')) | Out-Host; ('foc/src/algorithm=' + (Test-Path 'foc/src/algorithm')) | Out-Host; ('foc/src/math=' + (Test-Path 'foc/src/math')) | Out-Host; ('foc/src/interface=' + (Test-Path 'foc/src/interface')) | Out-Host

tasks.label: agent-commit-l3-phase1
tasks.command: git add "examples/GD32F303_FOCExplore/software/.eide/eide.yml" "foc/include/L3_Algorithm/foc_control_types.h" "foc/include/L3_Algorithm/foc_control_c02_cfg_state.h" "foc/include/L3_Algorithm/foc_control_compensation.h" "foc/include/L3_Algorithm/foc_control_internal.h" "foc/src/L3_Algorithm/foc_control_c03_outer_loop.c" "foc/src/L3_Algorithm/foc_control_init.c" "foc/include/L3_Algorithm/foc_control.h" "foc/src/L3_Algorithm/foc_control.c"; git commit -m "refactor: remove L3 legacy control shell and old umbrella header"; git show --name-status --oneline -n 1

tasks.label: agent-commit-l3-phase1-2
tasks.command: git commit -m "refactor: remove L3 legacy control shell and old umbrella header" && git show --name-status --oneline -n 1

tasks.label: agent-commit-l3-phase1-3
tasks.command: git commit -m 'refactor: remove L3 legacy control shell and old umbrella header'; git show --name-status --oneline -n 1
